Video.summary: Jeff Danker of Buckventures, returns to his home state of Oklahoma to chase a legendary buck on the Wallahchie Ranch — the "Big 8". With his bow in hand and one specific target in mind, the crew sets up in a blind for what turns into one of the craziest hunts they've ever experienced.
Video.title: "Bowhunting the Big 8"

Video.summary: Michael continues the family tradition of fish stew and gathering, with hopes that Larkin will pass on the same traditions.
Video.title: "Family Recipe"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken Letchworth set out on a new adventure, exploring food fishing and the great outdoors. This father son duo are making memories that will last a lifetime and will forever be etched in the digital world.
Video.title: "The Beginning"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff scour the rugged mountains of southern Arizona in search of the elusive Coues deer, known to hunters as the “Grey Ghost.” Through scorching sun and shifting winds, they test their skill and patience chasing one of North America’s most elusive big game animals.
Video.title: "Arizona Coues Deer"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: Willi heads back to Ohio to hunt a lease with good friends, Nick, Tom and Jason. He had a unique hunt the previous year on a golf course. They didn’t lease the golf course this year, but it was the same group hunting a familiar piece of property.
Video.title: "Stickers In Ohio"

Video.summary: With only a limited amount of time, Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Pine Island Sound, on the hunt for monster migratory Tarpon.
Video.title: "Tarpon Time"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff team up with their friends from Boss Shotshells in South Dakota for a high-energy upland hunt, pursuing wild pheasants with the help of skilled hunting dogs. The adventure takes a quirky turn with a visit to the iconic Corn Palace.
Video.title: "South Dakota Pheasant"

Video.summary: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch
Video.title: RMEF - "Better Than We Found It"

Video.summary: Mike tries to hold his own while fishing with Nick Fischer and Liza Fitzgerald in south seas Captiva. Good luck buddy.
Video.title: "Lil Jon"

Video.summary: Mike heads to the plantation on Crystal River to fish with Dallas King for trout and redfish.
Video.title: "King of the Mud Minnow"

Video.summary: Part one of Mike and Beth's adventure to Costa Rica's Zancudo Lodge.
Video.title: "Mrs Anderson's Rooster"

Video.summary: Part two of the Zancudo adventure. Mike and Beth fish for Mahi, Sailfish and Cubera Snapper.
Video.title: "(Costa Rica part 2) "Big Fish Javier""

Video.summary: Navigating the complex issues of deer management, Dan Cabela travels between Scotland and England to learn how land managers balance conservation with wild food harvesting.
Video.title: "Great Britain's Deer"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson sets his sights on a Free-Range New Zealand Red Stag, but it doesn't come easy. Dense fog, steep terrain, and thick vegetation make finding a mature stag no easy task. Watch as Mark Peterson and his guide cover the gorgeous New Zealand landscape in search of one of the most sought-after big game animals on the South Island of New - Zealand. On this hunt, Mark was unable to get his firearms import permit in time to take his Gunwerks rifle, so he'd again have to borrow from his guide.
Video.title: "The Stag"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson is in Ethiopia hunting Mountain Nyala. After the first two days, Mark has taken a Menelik’s Bushbuck and a Colobus Monkey but no Mountain Nyala. Finally, on Day 3 the hunting party receives the green light from the military to hunt in the area they wanted. It's time to put the Gunwerks rifle to the test.
Video.title: "Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"

Image.alt: "Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"
"Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"
"Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"

Video.summary: Join Mark Peterson as he embarks on a thrilling hunt in Croatia for the Eurasian Brown Bear. Experience the beauty of the Croatian wilderness and witness the skill and precision required for a successful hunt. Follow along as Mark faces all the challenges dealing with wind and a big bear that is extremely smart, making it very difficult to harvest this amazing animal. Don’t miss this exciting hunting adventure with Mark Peterson in Croatia!
Video.title: "Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"

Image.alt: "Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"
"Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"
"Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"

Video.summary: Follow along as Mark Peterson travels to Tanzania to hunt the Eastern and Western White-Bearded Wildebeest. These animals are known for their distinctive white beards and large horns, making them a sought-after trophy for hunters on an African safari. Mark sets out on an exciting and thrilling adventure to track down these elusive creatures in the plains of Tanzania.
Video.title: "Hunting White-Bearded Wildebeest - Tanzania"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff dive into the wild waters off Hawaii’s coast, coming face-to-face with sharks and graceful manta rays. The adrenaline peaks when Kyle takes a heart-pounding leap off a towering 40-foot cliff, making this adventure as daring as it is unforgettable.
Video.title: "Fishing Hawaii"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff explore the breathtaking Waipio Valley, the Hawaiian "Valley of the Kings," in search of prawns and bullfrogs. Their adventure continues up a massive volcano, hunting invasive rams, before ending with a feast of native fish paired with island fruits and spices.
Video.title: "Hunting Hawaii"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff hear about the dangers of fishing for Bluefin Tuna in the Atlantic Ocean from locals in Gloucester, Massachusetts. Then they head 30 miles out onto the open ocean with Darrin of Reel Respect Charters in the hopes of landing their own giant.
Video.title: "Gloucester Giant Bluefin"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken head to South Texas in search of trophy-sized trout. Along the way they make a pitstop to gear up and custom-build a Texas wading rod.
Video.title: "Double or Nothin'"

Video.summary: Atlanta is a city famous for vibrant art and tasty food, so for this episode the DIRT team went looking for the real people behind the scenes working to make this city so special. Josh meets celebrated chefs, barbers, farmers, and even a butter-wrapping machine dubbed André 4000 because he's "the second best 'wrapper' in Atlanta"—though special guest Killer Mike would probably take issue with that. Thirty years ago the real André announced to the world "the South got something to say," so tune in and listen up.
Video.title: DIRT - "Is Atlanta the NEW Food Capital of the South? | Farm-to-Table Feasts"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Is Atlanta the NEW Food Capital of the South? | Farm-to-Table Feasts"
DIRT - "Is Atlanta the NEW Food Capital of the South? | Farm-to-Table Feasts"
DIRT - "Is Atlanta the NEW Food Capital of the South? | Farm-to-Table Feasts"

Video.summary: From battling towering 12-foot waves in the Gulf of Alaska, to reeling in colossal 200 lb. halibut, they discover firsthand the rugged beauty of America's 49th state. This episode highlights Lindell Yachts as a top builder of rugged offshore sportfishing yachts, as well as Radon Boats as great pilothouse fishing and guide boats.
Video.title: "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2

Image.alt: "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2
"Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2
"Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2

Video.summary: Josh and his wife Anna celebrate the first day of summer by taking their daughters out for a fun-filled day on the water.
Video.title: "Family Day"

Video.summary: Josh heads offshore for the first day of red snapper season with his friend Joe Koenraad.
Video.title: "Opening Day"

Video.summary: When Plan A and Plan B don't go as planned, Destin always has a way of bailing you out.
Video.title: "Beach Bros"

Video.summary: In this episode of going coastal, Capt. Joshua Calhoon & Marcus Castro set out for epic Tarpon fishing. They got one boat side and then decided to go after giant mangrove snapper for hook & cook at Pepper’s!
Video.title: "Tarponist"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team does a - deep dive into a product founded by Engineered Marine Coatings called the Genius Bucket. The Genius Bucket being the ultimate DIY paint kit for those looking to tackle a marine painting job on there own. The team also checks out the capabilities it takes to restoring the older metal rub rail which derived from the Glastron project.
Video.title: Essentials - "Rub Rail Restoration & DIY Paint Bucket"

Image.alt: Essentials - "Rub Rail Restoration & DIY Paint Bucket"
Essentials - "Rub Rail Restoration & DIY Paint Bucket"
Essentials - "Rub Rail Restoration & DIY Paint Bucket"

Video.summary: We will take you to some of the wrecks in the Florida Keys that locals love to dive and share their rich history and the stories held deep aboard these sunken ships. We will also take a deep dive and discuss how these wrecks are critical to the environment.
Video.title: "Wrecks - Where Locals Love to Dive"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel to Walker, Minnesota to highlight a great organization tucked back in the woods called Camp Bliss! Camp Bliss hosts a wide arrange of events throughout the year that are tailored for Veterans to find rest, relaxation and respite. We tag along on an Ice Fishing outing, a turkey hunt and a Women's Veterans retreat as we highlight this great organization and the heroes they serve. We also highlight Des Moine Iowa SCHEELS hometown hero, Navy Veteran Steve Booth!
Video.title: "Camp Bliss"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel to Parker, South Dakota for a European pheasant hunt at Wings of Valor Lodge! The South Dakota DAV chapter is onsite for a great day of hunting and fellowship. We also honor Missoula Scheels Hometown Hero, Anton Johnson!
Video.title: "Wings of Valor"

Video.summary: On this adventure, we tag along with the Disabled American Veterans of Minnesota "Outdoor Programs" as they travel to Texas for a Hog hunt. We also honor our next Wichita Kansas Scheels Hometown Hero, Will Rivera!
Video.title: "Dav of MN Texas Hog Hunt"

Video.summary: On this adventure, we travel to Sioux Narrows Ontario Canada for a week long trip with Time on the Water to Lake of the Woods. In this episode we share the stories of Vietnam Veteran Leon Merhkens, fire fighters Jeff Benson/Seth Beyer and founder/CEO of Time on the Water, Chris Hansen. In addition, the fishing is pretty good too! We also highlight Iowa City Scheels Hometown hero Nic Pruter.
Video.title: "Time on the Water"

Video.summary: On a crisp Iowa November morning, everything comes together as Drake Lamb with Midwest Whitetail grunts in a massive 8-point buck that he encountered before with the WoodHaven Midwest Grunter. This is one hunt you don’t want to miss!
Video.title: "Dream November Hunt"

Video.summary: After years of chasing one of the oldest and most elusive bucks he's ever encountered, Phillip Vanderpool uses the WoodHaven Initmidator grunt call to finally gets his shot at Tinman, a legendary 10.5-year-old buck in Kansas.
Video.title: "Hunting a 10 1/2 YEAR OLD BUCK"

Video.summary: WoodHaven’s Josh Anderson heads to the Western Plains of Kansas in pursuit of a mature whitetail buck. Because of the wide open terrain, a decoy and blind calling can be very affective because of the visibility. After a few well-timed grunts on the Intimidator grunt call, a shooter buck shows up right at the base of the tree!
Video.title: "Kansas Buck Appears Out of Nowhere"

Video.summary: Mike Hunsucker of Heartland Bowhunter returns to a familiar ranch he’s helped manage for years, chasing a legendary buck nicknamed “Buddy.”
Video.title: "The Final Day Chase for “Buddy”"

Video.summary: CA fishes with Richard Black in Islamorada. This guy can do it all. Rain or shine, no fish is safe.
Video.title: "Good Days on Tough Days"

Video.summary: CA takes his Son Cam to the Sports Coast for some friendly Father Son competition.
Video.title: "Take Your Son To Work Day"

Video.summary: How do you catch a persnickety Redfish? One bite at a time.
Video.title: "Feast or Famine"

Video.summary: C.A. heads to Apalachicola for a mixed bag of redfish and fresh oyster.
Video.title: "Brett's World"

Video.summary: Rooted in history, Apalachicola, Florida, is where Capt. Jonathan Moss finds himself today, scouting the marsh for hungry backcountry dwellers.
Video.title: "Operation Apalach"

Video.summary: The tide is right for Capt. Jonathan Moss to chase that Northeast Florida slam.
Video.title: "First Coast Fishing"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss is fishing in the Northern Indian River Lagoon with DOA Lures Founder, Capt. Mark Nichols.
Video.title: "Space Coast Slam"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through Georgia, where we stop in Helen, Alpharetta and Atlanta!!
Video.title: "We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"

Image.alt: "We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"
"We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"
"We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through South Carolina, where we stop in Clemson, Travelers Rest and Charleston!!
Video.title: "Lowcountry Buzzer Beater! (Redfish on Fly)"

Video.summary: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.
Video.title: "The hunting heritage of South Africa"

Video.summary: Join Gavin as he heads up to Maine the last week of May to chase finicky gobblers with a couple good friends.
Video.title: The - "3 TURKEYS In 3 DAYS | TURKEY hunting in MAINE"

Image.alt: The - "3 TURKEYS In 3 DAYS | TURKEY hunting in MAINE"
The - "3 TURKEYS In 3 DAYS | TURKEY hunting in MAINE"
The - "3 TURKEYS In 3 DAYS | TURKEY hunting in MAINE"

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in Minnesota can be tough during opening week, but this season started on fire. Strutters in the decoys, hard-gobbling timber birds, fanning a solo tom … this episode has it all.
Video.title: "Minnesota Turkey Hunting: Season Kickoff"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson continues his quest on the Hearst Ranch in California. Next up on the list, California Aoudad. These Aoudad were introduced to the ranch in the early 1920s and have thrived ever since.
Video.title: "Chasing Giant Aoudad In California"

Video.summary: The last hunt in this series takes us to Texas in February of 2017. This time Mark is after his first Aoudad with a muzzleloader. Aoudad were introduced to Texas as an exotic species and it didn't take long for them to establish a large viable population in the ideal habitat that West Texas offers. Going into this hunt with the confidence and extended range that only Gunwerks can provide, Mark knows the odds are in his favor and it doesn't take long to come across multiple bands of rams. Thanks for following along in this 3 part series as we looked back on some of Mark's most memorable hunts for these incredible animals found all over the world. Click the link below to join and learn more about The Wild Sheep Foundation.
Video.title: "TX Aoudad Hunt, Sheep Week 2022"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson heads to the Lone Star State to chase big Texas whitetails. Mark’s second leg of the North America Deer Slam finds him smack dab in the middle of pre-rut. With warmer temps and bucks not yet rutting, it poses a few challenges for Mark to fill his tag. With a target buck acquired from previous trail cam data, Mark realizes it will only be a matter of time before the wide Texas bruiser steps out of the brush.
Video.title: "North America Deer Slam- Texas Whitetial"

Video.summary: Mark Scroggins and his family are in Oklahoma and spot a big gobbler from the road. They are pretty sure they can get in position to call him in but they have to be quick without being seen. His step-daughter Destiny is behind the trigger and Mark just about puts this ol gobbler in her lap!
Video.title: "HEART ATTACK TURKEY HUNT"

Video.summary: Mike is back after em in Alabama and finally finds a tone that this ol gobbler seems to like. Some timely calling and waiting patiently for this longbeard and his hen to make their way to his setup pays off. Back to work Mike, we have calls to make! It's the WoodHaven Way!
Video.title: "CALLING GOBBLERS"

Video.summary: Colten Scroggins and the whole family return to the blind to see if they can call one of the other gobblers back in to their setup. A family that hunts together stays together!
Video.title: "GIGGLES & GOBBLES"

Video.summary: David Lindsey’s 2024 Iowa season was anything but ordinary. He set his sights on one of the greatest bucks ever to roam The Lindsey Way farm — a deer he called “Pretty Boy.” From close calls to wild twists, David’s pursuit was full of highs, lows, and more excitement than any hunt in recent memory. But somewhere in the chaos, another story unfolded — a tough old buck that survived EHD and became just a little too predictable. David seized the opportunity, made the shot, and finally got some blood under his belt for the season.
Video.title: "Twists, Turns & Redemption"

Video.summary: Oregon is bursting with gobblers, making for some of the best turkey hunting in the country. Daniel Lifflander, HuntStand app developer, joins the Turkey POSSE to connect with his first-ever gobbler. Wasting no time, the hunt continues for Josh Dahlke and Mike Nelson as they end up in a turkey tornado and knock down an Oregon double.
Video.title: "TURKEY HUNTING in Oregon (PART 1) | HuntStand App Developer's FIRST Gobbler!"

Image.alt: "TURKEY HUNTING in Oregon (PART 1) | HuntStand App Developer's FIRST Gobbler!"
"TURKEY HUNTING in Oregon (PART 1) | HuntStand App Developer's FIRST Gobbler!"
"TURKEY HUNTING in Oregon (PART 1) | HuntStand App Developer's FIRST Gobbler!"

Video.summary: Willi and Tom Petry meet in Iowa with good friends, the Wrights to hunt turkeys on their farms. Willi and Tom drew the first season in Iowa and had the first kick at the cat for the spring. They had hunted deer with Cody and Cassie but neither had hunted turkeys in Iowa. They are hoping for a little luck with the gobblers, and they know they are going to have a good time trying.
Video.title: "Iowa Turkey, .410's and Reapers"
